events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need decide compliance for hot work with no fire watch during + post-work period. Industrial site, NFPA 51B, OSHA 1926 Subpart J. Fire watch required during hot work and for a post-work period (NFPA 51B requires fire watch for at least 30 minutes after completion, up to 60 min depending combustibles; OSHA 1926.352 requires fire watch during and for sufficient time after to ensure no possibility of fire, at least 30 min). So fail. Risk high/critical? No fire watch during and post-work period at heavy industrial site. Could be critical due to fire/explosion potential. But maybe high. Need choose one. Component conditions: installed-defective? non-compliant? The work is roughed in. The condition categories that may apply: installed-defective, non-compliant. Since no fire watch is non-compliant with code/spec, not necessarily component defective. Use non-compliant. Could include installed-defective? The hot work itself maybe installed? Not a component. Use ["non-compliant"]. percent_complete rough-complete maybe 80? value not asked 0. confidence 1.0. event_time etc 0. findings list. actions immediate corrective action: stop work, assign trained fire watch during and 30+ min after, remove combustibles, obtain hot work permit, inspect area. references NFPA 51B, OSHA 1926 Subpart J. Need output exactly JSON object. Ensure no extra prose.

events.label: response
events.text: {"decision":false,"risk":"critical","work_stage":"rough-complete","component_conditions":["non-compliant"],"percent_complete":80,"value":0,"sound_source":"","confidence":1.0,"event_time":0.0,"rate":0.0,"order":[],"workable":[],"findings":["No fire watch is present during hot work","No post-work fire watch is provided after hot work completion","Hot work is proceeding without required fire prevention controls"],"actions":["Immediately stop the hot work","Post a trained fire watch for the duration of hot work and for at least 30 minutes after completion (longer if combustibles are present)","Ensure a valid hot work permit is in place and covers the work area","Remove or shield combustibles and provide appropriate extinguishing equipment","Inspect the work area for smoldering/sparks before leaving"],"rationale":"NFPA 51B and OSHA 1926 Subpart J require a dedicated fire watch during hot work and for a post-work surveillance period to detect and extinguish ignition sources. The observed absence of any fire watch during and after the work violates these requirements and creates a serious fire/explosion hazard.","references":["NFPA 51B","OSHA 1926 Subpart J / 1926.352"]}
